rule_metadata.name: chgpass
rule_metadata.description: Detection patterns for the tool 'chgpass' taken from the ThreatHunting-Keywords github project
rule_metadata.author: @mthcht

rules.rule_text:
rule chgpass
{
	meta:
		description = "Detection patterns for the tool 'chgpass' taken from the ThreatHunting-Keywords github project"
		author = "@mthcht"
		reference = "https://github.com/mthcht/ThreatHunting-Keywords"
		tool = "chgpass"
		rule_category = "greyware_tool_keyword"

	strings:
		$string1 = /chgpass\.exe.{0,1000}Administrator\s/ nocase ascii wide
		$string2 = /chgpass\.exe.{0,1000}DSRM/ nocase ascii wide

	condition:
		any of them
}
